value.body:
## Context

Cycle should not require the desktop app to be the only way to run or inspect the local backend.

## Outcome

The CLI can start the backend, show runtime status, and run diagnostics for configuration, repository registration, provider detection, database projection, and API reachability.

## Acceptance criteria

- `cycle backend start` launches the reusable backend runtime with safe loopback defaults.
- `cycle backend status` reports discovered runtime, API URL, auth mode, repositories, and task counts.
- `cycle doctor` or equivalent checks config files, database access, Git remotes, agent providers, and sync warnings.
- Commands return machine-readable output where practical.
- Tests cover command behavior with provided config and fake runtime discovery.

frontmatter.title: Add CLI backend start, status, and doctor commands

value.title: Add CLI backend start, status, and doctor commands
